# MATLAB autosave and backup files
*.asv
*.m~
*.autosave

# MATLAB generated folders
slprj/
codegen/

# COMSOL model and recovery files
# Ignore COMSOL model files by default.
# Small teaching/example models can be explicitly allowed below.
*.mph
*.mphbin
*.mph.lock
*.recovery
*.tmp

# Allow small teaching example COMSOL models inside examples/
!examples/**/*.mph

# Large simulation outputs
*.mat
*.h5
*.hdf5
*.dat
*.csv

# Allow small example metadata files if needed
!examples/**/*.csv

# COMSOL exported/generated files that are usually not source files
*.mphthumbnail
*.log
*.java.bak

# OS files
.DS_Store
Thumbs.db

# Editor and IDE files
.vscode/
.idea/

# Python cache files, if helper scripts are added later
__pycache__/
*.pyc

# Temporary files
*.bak
*.old
*.swp
*.swo
~$*
